title: astragalus coltonii var. moabensis
intro: Astragalus coltonii var. moabensis, also known as Moab milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Astragalus coltonii var. moabensis include immune system support, anti-fatigue effects, and potential anti-cancer properties. Astragalus coltonii var. moabensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
